text.title: Twitter X Monetization Thread To Product Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing the path from preconditions to a valid spec artefact.

example.title: Happy-path spec artefact
example.description: Indie hackers building audience before product who lack a deterministic path from a high-impression thread to a paid SKU — and keep losing the audience signal to inbox noise. An operator with all prerequisites in place runs the methodology; outcome is a validated spec matching the output contract.
example.trace: Inputs satisfied → decision-tree run branch fires → rule r1-audience-signal-required drives the artefact shape → self-check PASS → validator exit 0 → returned to caller.
